comment.body:
Alma, thank you for all that you bring and give to us here.
Wishing you a peaceful break over the long weekend.
And thanks to everyone else who contributes here.
Yesterday morning, I found myself a bit too absorbed in what the market was doing "right now" - like watching the screen had become too habitual.
I shed some risk and immediately felt better, and was able to step back and disconnect.
It reminded me of a scene from Wim Wender's 1991 film, before the iPhone and doom-scrolling enabled by recommender systems.
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gigNr13l4UI
(Okay, it's a little art house.)

comment.body:
🚨 SPX 0DTE Road Map Update – 10:00 AM  
Spot ≈ 5790 (Post Tape Bomb Rebound)

—

📈 IF ABOVE 5790

→ IF 5790–5800  
 • Thin structure → may rip  
 • 5800 = long gamma threshold

→ IF 5800–5820  
 • Stabilization begins  
 • Controlled, grindy action

→ IF > 5820  
 • Opens path to 5840  
 • Volatility fades, slow climb zone

—

📉 IF BELOW 5790

→ IF 5790–5770  
 • Whipsaw zone, 2-way flow

→ IF 5770–5745  
 • Sell pressure returns  
 • Acceleration risk

→ IF < 5745  
 • 5720–5730 retest  
 • Bounce attempts but unstable

→ IF < 5720  
 • 5700–5680 = short gamma chaos  
 • Gap-like flushes possible

—

🎯 KEY LEVELS  
• Long gamma flips = 5800  
• Stabilization zone = 5820  
• Battle zone = 5770  
• Breakdown line = 5745  
• Panic trigger = 5720

comment.body:
U.S. Pauses Trump's Sovereign Wealth Fund Plans
The U.S. government has placed its plans for a sovereign wealth fund on hold, as announced by Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent. Originally ordered by President Trump, the fund was intended to be financed by tariffs on imports. Prioritization of other governmental initiatives has stalled development.

comment.body: Even though she likely won’t see this for quite a few days, I wanted to offer my thanks to Alma for making me a better options trader.  Eleven days ago, she first mentioned that the odds were looking pretty good for a mean-reverting trade (but it should be hedged).  So I started building a hedged position and slowly added to it over the last two weeks.  Today, I rolled it down to take advantage of the new spot levels.  My profits (including the loss on the hedge) were 69+%.  The “old” me wouldn’t have hedged, and wouldn’t have rolled it down to lock in some of the profits.  So thank you!!!
comment.raw_body: Even though she likely won’t see this for quite a few days, I wanted to offer my thanks to Alma for making me a better options trader.  Eleven days ago, she first mentioned that the odds were looking pretty good for a mean-reverting trade (but it should be hedged).  So I started building a hedged position and slowly added to it over the last two weeks.  Today, I rolled it down to take advantage of the new spot levels.  My profits (including the loss on the hedge) were 69+%.  The “old” me wouldn’t have hedged, and wouldn’t have rolled it down to lock in some of the profits.  So thank you!!!
